title: Shivrajpur beach
tagline: Shivrajpur beach — beach town of Gujarat

overview.short: Shivrajpur beach, near Shivrajpur village, is located in the Devbhumi Dwarka district of Gujarat, India.
overview.description: Shivrajpur beach, near Shivrajpur village, is located in the Devbhumi Dwarka district of Gujarat, India. It is a white-sand beach with azure, clear water. The water is shallow. It was awarded the Blue Flag beach certification in October 2020 by the Foundation for Environment Education, a Denmark-based voluntary organization.

topPlaces.name: Bhimrana
topPlaces.description: Bhimrana is a large village located in Okhamandal Taluka of Jamnagar district, Gujarat. It is situated 16km away from sub-district headquarter Dwarka and 158km away from district headquarter Jamnagar.

topPlaces.name: Dwarka
topPlaces.description: Dwarka () is a coastal town and municipality of Devbhumi Dwarka district in the Indian state of Gujarat. It is located on the western shore of the Okhamandal Peninsula on the right bank of the Gomti River at the mouth of the Gulf of Kutch facing the Arabian Sea.

topPlaces.name: Mithapur Solar Power Plant
topPlaces.description: Mithapur Solar Power Plant is a 25 MW solar power plant located in Mithapur, Gujarat. It is expected to produce 40,734 MWh/year.

items.note: Bhimrana is a large village located in Okhamandal Taluka of Jamnagar district, Gujarat. It is situated 16km away from sub-district headquarter Dwarka and 158km away from district headquarter Jamnagar.

Dwarka () is a coastal town and municipality of Devbhumi Dwarka district in the Indian state of Gujarat. It is located on the western shore of the Okhamandal Peninsula on the right bank of the Gomti River at the mouth of the Gulf of Kutch facing the Arabian Sea.
Mithapur Solar Power Plant is a 25 MW solar power plant located in Mithapur, Gujarat. It is expected to produce 40,734 MWh/year.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shivrajpur beach?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shivrajpur beach is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shivrajpur beach?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Porbandar Airport (105 km) and the nearest railway station is Rajkot Junction (189 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shivrajpur beach?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shivrajpur beach at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shivrajpur beach?
faq.a: Stays in Shivrajpur beach start from ₹1,200 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shivrajpur beach?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bhimrana, Dwarka, Mithapur Solar Power Plant.
